{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Royal Guard of Karosha’s Dragon Court
| introduced = lh-02-the-engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Royal Guard of Karosha’s Dragon Court]] is a group within the [[Karoshan]] empire.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c7">''The Engineer'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Karoshan]] royal guard is under attack and requesting assistance from [[The Last Horizon]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c17">''The Knight'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon groups]]
